scripts.dev: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm check:core-imports && pnpm --filter @schoolos/core build && pnpm check:core-dist && pnpm --parallel --filter @schoolos/api --filter @schoolos/web dev
scripts.build: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm check:core-imports && pnpm --filter @schoolos/core build && pnpm check:core-dist && pnpm --filter @schoolos/api build && pnpm --filter @schoolos/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm check:core-imports && pnpm --filter @schoolos/api format:check && pnpm --filter @schoolos/web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm check:core-imports && pnpm --filter @schoolos/core typecheck && pnpm check:core-dist && pnpm --filter @schoolos/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @schoolos/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm check:core-imports && pnpm --filter @schoolos/api test && pnpm --filter @schoolos/web test
scripts.db:validate: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm --filter @schoolos/api exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.verify:deploy:core: pnpm compile:artifacts && pnpm verify:env:deploy && pnpm verify:tracked-artifacts && pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:validate && pnpm verify:openapi && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build
